sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35960" key="e)no/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνόρειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄρος</etym>) <sense id="n35960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the mountains,</tr_> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνόριον,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:832" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">832</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
